cad_specification:
from cadquery import Workplane

# Create ring band as a torus
# Major radius: 8.5mm (distance from center to tube center)
# Minor radius: 1.5mm (tube thickness radius)
ring_band = (Workplane("XY")
    .circle(8.5)  # Major radius circle
    .workplane(offset=0)
    .circle(1.5)  # Minor radius for tube cross-section
    .sweep(Workplane("XY").circle(8.5), makeSolid=True, isFrenet=True)
)

# Alternative torus creation method using revolve
ring_band = (Workplane("XZ")
    .center(8.5, 0)  # Move t...
